queries_used.operator_hub_breakdown:
SELECT shared_damage_operator AS operator,
       COUNT(*) AS edge_count
FROM cross_domain_edges
GROUP BY shared_damage_operator
ORDER BY shared_damage_operator
queries_used.hub_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS hub_count FROM abstract_compositions
queries_used.ci_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS ci_count FROM composition_instances
queries_used.thm_count: SELECT COUNT(*) AS thm_count FROM tradition_hub_matrix
queries_used.thm_filled:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS filled
FROM tradition_hub_matrix
WHERE status IS NOT NULL AND status != ''
queries_used.ci_distinct_pairs:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT comp_id || '||' || COALESCE(tradition,'')) AS filled_pairs
FROM composition_instances
queries_used.depth2_filled: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM depth2_matrix WHERE status = 'FILLED'
queries_used.depth2_impossible: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM depth2_matrix WHERE status = 'IMPOSSIBLE'

computation.note: The 99.4% figure is depth2_matrix: 14680 FILLED / 14774 total = 99.36%. 94 cells are IMPOSSIBLE (structurally forbidden operator pairs).
